title: Vanilla Leaves
description: Reverts any packs leaves to the vanilla model.
body:
###
[ 1.2 - 1.21.5 ]
### This pack **MUST** be placed **over** other resource packs to take effect. Vanilla Leaves simply reverts the model of all leaves back to vanilla in case you don't like or lose many frames with any fancy leaf models. > Latest changes: > - updated to 1.21.5 **What does it do?** All this pack does is sets the model of all leafs to the vanilla model without changing any texture that a resource pack might provide. **Will it change anything on its own?** No, It will only have effect when overtop of a resource pack that changes the leaf model. **Will this increase my FPS?** Maybe, This will not increase over vanilla but might restore lost FPS from having custom leave models. With my resource pack [Essentially Tweaked](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/essentially-tweaked) I get about 60 FPS with custom leaves and about 110 with vanilla leaves sitting still in the same spot. --- ![Comparing Leaves](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/k4UCgT05/images/ea11d3db26fcc61f8bc8c97ef96d5f4c4a9c08bc.png)
